item.title: How to Break a Shopping Habit
item.description: Simple, realistic steps to reduce impulse shopping without relying on willpower.

media:content.media:title: How to Break a Shopping Habit
media:content.media:description: Simple, realistic steps to reduce impulse shopping without relying on willpower.

item.title: Why More People Are Shopping Less
item.description: A simple look at why many people are cutting back on shopping and choosing more intentional spending habits.

media:content.media:title: Why More People Are Shopping Less
media:content.media:description: A simple look at why many people are cutting back on shopping and choosing more intentional spending habits.

item.title: You're the Frog in Boiling Water
item.description: A simple reminder to notice small changes before they add up. A practical, relatable message from That Practical Mom.

media:content.media:title: You're the Frog in Boiling Water
media:content.media:description: A simple reminder to notice small changes before they add up. A practical, relatable message from That Practical Mom.

item.title: You Can’t Hyper-Optimize a Toddler
item.description: A realistic reminder that some routines need flexibility. That Practical Mom shares a simple, practical take on parenting and productivity.

media:content.media:title: You Can’t Hyper-Optimize a Toddler
media:content.media:description: A realistic reminder that some routines need flexibility. That Practical Mom shares a simple, practical take on parenting and productivity.
